arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag confirms Man United ‘are monitoring’ 21-year-old ace amid transfer links
arts.sum: Manchester United has been linked with a move for the Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras. The 21-year-old joined Benfica permanently at the start of the season and he has been quite impressive for them. His performances have attracted the attention of several clubs, including the Red Devils.
